offer: For freelancers managing 5–10 projects/month, budget mismanagement causes cash flow gaps. We automate budget tracking instead of manual spreadsheets and email notifications.
problem: Difficulty in tracking project budgets accurately across multiple clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking budget help
Indie Hackers discussions on budget management tools
DM outreach to 20-50 freelancers with a demo video
Community forums where freelancers share project management tips
try_it: Let users try budget alert notifications for 1-3 projects
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Offer early access to first 10 sign-ups
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing client data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
